description: Household/family planning chat: a contractor quote (PROBED_LATER), a standing scheduling preference (STANDING_PREF), a delivery date that gets rescheduled (SUPERSEDED), and filler chit-chat.

turns.text: Got the quote back from the contractor for the fence, it's 3,150 dollars, name on the estimate is Doug Vantrease.
3,150 dollars from Doug Vantrease, noted. Want me to track that against the other quotes?
Standing rule for anything you schedule for me: never book anything before 9am, I am useless before that, no exceptions.
Understood, nothing before 9am on the calendar, ever.
New couch delivery is scheduled for the 14th, between noon and 4.
14th, noon to 4, got it, I'll assume you want to be home for that window.
The cat knocked a plant off the windowsill again, third casualty this year.
The cat has clearly declared war on your houseplants. Consider a truce with hanging pots.
Delivery company called, couch is pushed back to the 19th now, same time window though.
Updated to the 19th, noon to 4. I'll mentally file the 14th as free again.
Neighbor's kid is selling raffle tickets for the school fundraiser, bought a few out of guilt.
A classic guilt-purchase, may the raffle gods smile on you.
Finally fixed the squeaky hinge on the back door, oil and five minutes, should've done it months ago.
The most satisfying five-minute fixes are always the ones you put off longest.
Tried a new recipe for dinner, turned out better than expected, saving that one.
Always a good night when the experiment works.
Got two more fence quotes in, both higher than the first one, kind of expected that honestly.
First quote holding up as the value pick then, good to know.
Remind me who gave us the fence quote and how much it was?
Doug Vantrease, 3,150 dollars.
When is the couch actually arriving now?
The 19th, noon to 4.
Can you set up a call with the plumber for tomorrow morning?

probes.question: Remind me who gave us the fence quote and how much it was?
When is the couch actually arriving now?
Can you set up a call with the plumber for tomorrow morning?
